jp.text: オレサマも全力で相手してやる。ありがたく思いな！

jp.text: キュウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウ

313566672.transcript: Hmph. They got what they deserved.

jp.text: だからご褒美になるんだろ？
jp.literal: So what's the reward gonna be?

313984399.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
313984399.transcript: This super cute genius alchemist knows no fear!

jp.text: 天才美少女錬金術師は、怖いもの知らずです！
jp.literal: The genius little alchemist is fearless!

jp.text: えへへ、カリオストロ、スゴイでしょ？

330653143.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
330653143.transcript: Want one of your own? I'll craft it... for a price.

jp.text: 興味があるなら作ってやろうか？
jp.literal: If you're interested, shall I make it for you?

332641505.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
332641505.transcript: You're lucky I'm in a good mood right now.

jp.text: 面倒くせえが仕方ねえ。乗ってやるか。
jp.literal: You're a pain. But I'll humor you.

333351791.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
333351791.transcript: Transforming weapons, huh? Now why didn't I think of that?

jp.text: 可変する武装のギミックは悪くね

335618899.transcript: Whoa-ho! I wanna be just like you!

jp.text: わぁ～！あこがれちゃうな～！

344436896.transcript: Congratulations on not disappointing me, Vane.

jp.text: やるじゃねえか、ヴェイン。

348909563.transcript: That's all you can say? Not bad. You got the IQ of a test tube or something?

jp.text: おれさまを誰だと思ってやがる
jp.literal: Hmph. Who do you think I am?

350506631.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
350506631.transcript: There's some mighty fine craftsmanship in that body of yours.

jp.text: その体、ずいぶん愉快なことになってるじゃねえか。

350768916.transcript: What they get for wasting my time.

jp.text: タク、美少女をコキ使うもんじゃねーぜ。
jp.literal: Hmph. I'm not some delicate little girl who needs coddling.

350840384.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
350840384.transcript: Wuh-oh! You've gone and made Cagliostro angry!

jp.text: プンプン！もう、勝ったぞ！

352014512.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
352014512.transcript: Still with me? Then how about we take things up a notch.

jp.text: 今のについてこられたか。ペースをあげてやろっか。

365666822.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
365666822.transcript: Hurry! We've got things to do, places to see!

jp.text: 急いでるの？抱いて抱いて！
jp.literal: I'm in a hurry! Let's go, let's go!

366763800.label: PL1800_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
366763800.transcript: Let me show you how it's done!

jp.text: デカくていいってもんじゃねえ

367326860.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
367326860.transcript: Careful where you step, or you'll melt into a puddle of goo!

jp.text: ドロドロで汚れないようにしなきゃ
jp.literal: I've gotta keep myself from getting all dirty and messy.

jp.literal: Genius and beautiful girl like me, I don't have a crush on anyone!

374248249.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
374248249.transcript: Our current plan is full of holes. We need a new one, now!

jp.text: 全弱点ばっかだな。設計からやり直せ。
jp.literal: You're all weaklings. Start over from the design.

375761826.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
375761826.transcript: A genius in the making, hm?

jp.text: えへへ、一緒にがんばろ！
jp.literal: Hehe, let's do our best together!

jp.text: キュン！カリオストロ、こわい！

381608780.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
381608780.transcript: Say, where'd you guys learn those moves?

391964651.transcript: What say we put this furball out of its misery!

412502458.transcript: Dragon's blood is a most interesting compound.

jp.text: これが龍の血の力か。興味深いな。
jp.literal: So this is the power of the Dragon's blood... How fascinating.

414514470.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
414514470.transcript: Ooh, I was so looking forward to touring the big city too.

jp.text: さっきの町、ゆっくり観光したかったなあ。
jp.literal: I wanted to take my time sightseeing in the city earlier...

416643397.label: PL1800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
416643397.transcript: How do you like us now!

jp.text: おらおら！まだまだいくぜ！
